name: forest-world-visual-qc
description: Validate the sanitized Creator Store forest template, detailed World 1 trees, readable landmarks, and non-blocking decorative layout.

args.code: local H=game:GetService('HttpService') local a=game.ReplicatedStorage:FindFirstChild('PunchWallVisualAssets') local t=a and a:FindFirstChild('StylizedForestTreeTemplate') local m,s,b,badMesh,badSurface=0,0,0,0,0 if t then for _,d in ipairs(t:GetDescendants()) do if d:IsA('MeshPart') then m+=1 local id=d.MeshId if id~='rbxassetid://16460201079' and id~='rbxassetid://16460182102' then badMesh+=1 end elseif d:IsA('SurfaceAppearance') then s+=1 if d.ColorMap~='rbxassetid://16460182437' then badSurface+=1 end elseif d:IsA('LuaSourceContainer') then b+=1 end end end return H:JSONEncode({template=t~=nil,meshes=m,surfaces=s,scripts=b,badMesh=badMesh,badSurface=badSurface})

local H=game:GetService('HttpService') local root=workspace.PunchWallRPG local f=root.Polish['World 1 Forest'] local out={trees=0,canopies=0,spawnTrees=0,spawnCanopies=0,templateModels=0,scripts=0,unsafeCollision=0} for _,d in ipairs(f:GetDescendants()) do local r=d:GetAttribute('VisualRole') if r=='ForestTree' then out.trees+=1 elseif r=='ForestCanopy' then out.canopies+=1 elseif r=='ForestSpawnTree' then out.spawnTrees+=1 elseif r=='ForestSpawnCanopy' then out.spawnCanopies+=1 end if d:GetAttribute('CreatorStoreTemplateUsed') then out.templateModels+=1 end if d:IsA('LuaSourceContainer') then out.scripts+=1 end if d:IsA('BasePart') and d:GetAttribute('CreatorStoreAssetId') and (d.CanCollide or d.CanTouch or d.CanQuery) then out.unsafeCollision+=1 end end local sign=f['World 1 Forest Gateway'] local overlap=false for _,n in ipairs({'Forest Spawn Lantern -1','Forest Spawn Lantern 1'}) do local lamp=f:FindFirstChild(n) if lamp and math.abs(lamp.Position.X-sign.Position.X)<(lamp.Size.X+sign.Size.X)/2 and math.abs(lamp.Position.Y-sign.Position.Y)<(lamp.Size.Y+sign.Size.Y)/2 then overlap=true end end local training=root['Forest Training Camp Sign'] out.theme=f:GetAttribute('WorldTheme') out.version=f:GetAttribute('ForestVisualVersion') out.asset=f:GetAttribute('PrimaryTreeAssetId') out.signLampOverlap=overlap out.trainingSignClear=training.Position.Y-training.Size.Y/2>9 out.zoneDividers=0 for _,d in ipairs(f:GetDescendants()) do if d:GetAttribute('VisualRole')=='ForestZoneDivider' then out.zoneDividers+=1 end end return H:JSONEncode(out)
